mapper.sql: select id, check_in_id, elder_id, checkout_type, checkout_date, actual_leave_date, reason, total_charged, total_deducted, refund_amount, arrears, status, remark, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by from check_out
mapper.select: select co.id, co.check_in_id, co.elder_id, co.checkout_type, co.checkout_date, co.actual_leave_date, co.reason, co.total_charged, co.total_deducted, co.refund_amount, co.arrears, co.status, e.name as elder_name, e.id_card_no, e.phone, b.bed_number, r.room_number, f.name as floor_name from check_out co left join elder e on co.elder_id = e.id left join check_in ci on co.check_in_id = ci.id left join check_in_cost cic on ci.id = cic.check_in_id left join bed b on cic.bed_id = b.id left join room r on b.room_id = r.id left join floor f on r.floor_id = f.id where co.id = #{id}
mapper.insert:
insert into check_out
check_in_id, elder_id, checkout_type, checkout_date, actual_leave_date, reason, total_charged, total_deducted, refund_amount, arrears, status, remark, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by,
#{checkInId}, #{elderId}, #{checkoutType}, #{checkoutDate}, #{actualLeaveDate}, #{reason}, #{totalCharged}, #{totalDeducted}, #{refundAmount}, #{arrears}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{createBy}, #{updateBy},
mapper.delete:
delete from check_out where id in
#{id}
